description:
Recto: probably a letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic; Arabic jottings in the margin. 

Verso: beginning of a deed of acknowledgment (iqrār) in Arabic script. The muqirr is Bū Naṣr b. Bū l-[...]. In the upper margin the name Ḥalfon b. Yosef appears in Hebrew letters. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
